container.heading: HIV Testing for Pregnant Women Receiving Prenatal Care

annotations.annotation: Regulation .01A amended effective December 14, 2009 (36:25 Md. R. 1954)
Regulation .01F adopted effective December 14, 2009 (36:25 Md. R. 1954)

Regulation .03 amended effective December 14, 2009 (36:25 Md. R. 1954)
Regulation .04 amended effective December 14, 2009 (36:25 Md. R. 1954)
Regulation .05 amended effective December 14, 2009 (36:25 Md. R. 1954)
Regulation .07B amended effective December 14, 2009 (36:25 Md. R. 1954)
Chapter revised effective March 27, 2017 (44:6 Md. R. 326)
Chapter repealed effective May 7, 2018 (45:9 Md. R. 462)
